## Risk to production

<!-- Since main auto-deploys to www.eraugher.site, call out anything risky -->
- [ ] Low risk (isolated change, easy rollback)
- [ ] Medium risk (touches shared logic or DB)
- [ ] High risk (touches auth, payments, deployment config, or secrets)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials hardcoded in this diff
- [ ] I've tested this locally before opening the PR
- [ ] I'm ready for this to go live on merge (Render deploys `main` automatically)
